Vahdam P&L Tracker

TikTok Shop UK + US · Orders, Affiliate, Ad Spend, Creatives · CM1 / CM2 with UK tax rules
→
Display currency follows region: UK→GBP; US→USD; Both→USD (UK×FX). Net Sales (top line) excludes cancelled, samples, refunds, returns. UK VAT treatment in PnL: 20% VAT subtracted from Net Sales for zero-rated supplements (Coffee Apr 2026+, Green Burner, Ashwagandha Caps, Turmeric Curcumin) before building CM. Ginger Tea keeps VAT in sales (non-supplement). Other UK rules: £1.99/order shipping from Mar 2026; Ad spend + Smart Promo grossed up ×1.20 (Seller Center shows VAT-EXCL); VAT recovery = (Ad+SP)incl × 20/120 added back to CM2. US: no VAT/shipping rules.

Sortable, searchable. Free gifts shown with FREE tag when included.

Monthly CM History Jan–May 2026

UK monthly computed from order CSVs + UK Inventory Planning costs + Seller Center monthly ad spend. UK tax rules applied. US monthly from your USA workbook. Filters above (SKU + variation) apply here too.
Live: TikTok Seller Center scrape (Chrome via CDP) + manual affiliate CSVs + manual smart promo. UK COGs/CM2 from Vahdam Inventory Planning sheet. · Crafted for VAHDAM India
